author: Dhruba Saha
name: Record: 11L Enhanced GPTQ-lite Per-Row (1.1218)
blurb: Enhanced GPTQ-lite with per-row optimal clip percentile search (13 candidates vs 5, per-row selection vs global). Built on SOTA stack: 11L, EMA(0.997), XSA4, Partial RoPE 16/64, SmearGate, BigramHash, VE128, Late QAT@0.15, int6+zstd.
